overview: A modern, premium marketing website for Olympia Lily Wellness Private Limited — a healthcare and nutritional supplements company based in Nagaon, Assam, India. Features a professional hero section, product showcase (Vitamins, Calcium, Protein, Wellness), founder profile, contact form with WhatsApp integration, and a fully responsive layout with smooth animations.
features: Hero section with tagline and CTA buttons
Product categories with filterable grid (Vitamins, Calcium, Protein, Others)
Founder profile with photo (Abul Kalam Azad)
Why Choose Us section with trust features
Contact form with WhatsApp and phone integration
Smooth scroll navigation and CSS animations
